summary: Frontend testing of multilingual SEO features for Global Jobs Consulting website. Tested language-specific URL routing, hreflang tags, canonical URLs, language switcher, navigation links, and hero slider. Found one SEO bug: duplicate canonical URLs due to hardcoded canonical in index.html.

seo_issues.issue: Duplicate canonical URLs - hardcoded canonical in index.html (https://www.gjc.ro) conflicts with dynamic canonical from SEOHead component
seo_issues.details: On /de/kontakt page, there are 2 canonical tags: 1) https://www.gjc.ro (from index.html, no data-seo attr) 2) https://www.gjc.ro/de/kontakt (from SEOHead, with data-seo=true). Search engines may get confused by conflicting canonicals.
seo_issues.fix_suggestion: Either remove the hardcoded canonical from index.html line 11, or update SEOHead to remove ALL existing canonical tags (not just those with data-seo attribute)

passed_tests: Language-specific URL routing works: /en/contact, /de/kontakt, /sr/kontakt all load correctly
Hreflang tags present in page head (ro, en, de, sr, x-default) - 5 tags total
Hreflang tags have correct URLs for each language version
Language switcher navigates to correct localized URLs (tested EN->DE switch)
Navigation links use localized paths based on current language (verified in German)
Footer links use localized paths based on current language (verified in German)
Hero slider has 6 slides as expected
Hero slider has 3 video backgrounds (slides 0, 3, 5 - Cruise, Agriculture, Logistics)
All pages display content in selected language (tested RO, EN, DE, SR)
HTML lang attribute updates correctly when language changes
localStorage stores language preference correctly (gjc-language key)
action_items: FIX: Remove hardcoded canonical tag from /app/frontend/public/index.html line 11, OR update SEOHead.jsx to remove ALL canonical tags (not just data-seo ones) before adding new one
critical_code_review_comments: SEOHead.jsx line 104: removeExisting selector only removes canonicals with data-seo attribute, but index.html has a canonical without this attribute
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multilingual URL routing and hreflang features working correctly. One SEO bug found: duplicate canonical URLs. The SEOHead component correctly adds language-specific canonical with data-seo attribute, but index.html has a hardcoded canonical without this attribute that's not being removed. Fix is simple: either remove line 11 from index.html or update SEOHead to remove all canonical tags.

canonical_url.issue: Two canonical tags present - one hardcoded in index.html, one dynamic from SEOHead
